zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Andrews於大約1406年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可貝利哈姆時，她的父親James Andrews22歲，母親Alice de Weyland18歲。她於1430年與John Hotofte  Tiptoft在英國素福爾可貝利哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1444年在英國英格蘭素福爾可沃薩姆享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可沃薩姆。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Andrews was born about 1406, in Baylham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Andrews, was 22 and her mother, Alice de Weyland, was 18. She married John Hotofte  Tiptoft in 1430, in Baylham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died in 1444, in Wortham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Wortham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé John Hotofte  Tiptoft en 1430, à Baylham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1444, à Wortham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Wortham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Andrews(이)가 대략 1406년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베이함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Andrews(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Weyland(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1430년 영국 수폴크 베이함에서 John Hotofte  Tiptoft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1444년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 워섬에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 워섬에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Hotofte  Tiptoft em 1430, em Baylham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. ru.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Andrews родилась около 1406 г. в местности беилхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Andrews было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Weyland, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hotofte  Tiptoft в 1430 г. в местности беилхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1444 г. в местности вортам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности вортам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
